description: Post-milestone learning loop: five-minute retro after a task run or feature lands — surprises become CLAUDE.md candidates, repetition becomes skill suggestions, friction becomes process tweaks. Closes the amnesia gap where every run starts smart and ends forgotten. Includes /retrospective:run.
